title: GUIDE FOR WILD BIRD VIDEOS
source_file: D:\reelops\niches\WILD BIRD VIDEOS\GUIDE FOR WILD BIRD VIDEOS.docx
preserved_instructions_excerpt:
GROW WITH RASINDU
BIRD VIDEOS  – GUIDE
JOIN OUR TELEGRAM CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
JOIN OUR WHATSAPP CHANNEL👉 GrowWithRasindu
Join my community to get future prompts and complete step-by-step guides
👉 nas.io/growwithrasindu
This guide is written in simple English.If you prefer to read this in your own language,copy this entire guide and paste it into ChatGPT.Then type: "Translate this into [your language]"and it will give you the full guide in your language.
මෙම මාර්ගෝපදේශය සරල ඉංග්‍රීසියෙන් ලියා ඇත.ඔබට ඔබේ භාෂාවෙන් කියවීමට අවශ්‍ය නම්,
මෙම සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය copy කර ChatGPT වෙත paste කරන්න.එවිට මෙසේ type කරන්න: "Translate this into Sinhala"එවිට ඔබට සිංහල භාෂාවෙන් සම්පූර්ණ මාර්ගෝපදේශය ලැබෙනු ඇත.
यह गाइड सरल अंग्रेजी में लिखी गई है।अगर आप इसे अपनी भाषा में पढ़ना चाहते हैं,तो इस पूरी गाइड को copy करके ChatGPT में paste करें।फिर टाइप करें: "Translate this into Hindi"और आपको पूरी गाइड हिंदी में मिल जाएगी।
هذا الدليل مكتوب باللغة الإنجليزية البسيطة.
إذا كنت تفضل قراءته بلغتك الخاصة،
انسخ هذا الدليل كاملاً والصقه في ChatGPT.
ثم اكتب: "Translate this into Arabic"
وستحصل على الدليل كاملاً باللغة العربية.
STEP 01 — Master Prompt Setup
Open a new Claude AI chat. Copy the master prompt and paste it into the chat. Send it.
Claude will automatically generate a list of 10 unique exotic bird designs. Each bird will have a completely different color palette, size and special features.
STEP 02 — Select Your Bird
Type the number of the bird you want from the list.
Example: 4
Claude will then generate 5 environment options suited to that specific bird. Each option will have a different location, time of day and weather condition.
STEP 03 — Select Your Environment
Type the letter of the environment you want.
Example: C
Claude will generate three prompts:
Image Prompt — bird perched on branch
Video Prompt 01 — landing scene
Video Prompt 02 — natural behavior scene
STEP 04 — Create Image A
Open Google Flow. Go to the image generation section. Paste the Image Prompt and generate.
Download the result.
This is Image A — bird on branch.
STEP 05 — Create Image B
Start a new generation in Google Flow. Add Image A as the reference image. Type this into the prompt box:
"remove bird"
Generate and download the result.
This is Image B — empty branch, no bird.
STEP 06 — Create Video 01
Go to the video generation section in Google Flow.
Start Frame → Add Image B — empty branch
End Frame → Add Image A — bird on branch
Prompt → Paste Video Prompt 01
Generate and download.
This is Video 01 — bird flies into frame and lands on branch.
STEP 07 — Create Video 02
Start a new video generation in Google Flow.
Start Frame → Add Image A — bird on branch
End Frame → Leave empty, add nothing
Prompt → Paste Video Prompt 02
Generate and download.
This is Video 02 — bird natural behavior on branch.
STEP 08 — Join and Export in CapCut
Open CapCut. Create a new project.
Import Video 01 and Video 02. Place Video 01 first on the timeline, then place Video 02 directly after it.
Check the join point — Video 01 ends with the bird on the branch, Video 02 starts with the same bird on the same branch. The join will be seamless.
Export the final video. Set resolution to 1080p or 4K. Set frame rate to 24fps.
